description: Lease expired with no renewal; agent confirms move-out and closes cleanly.

task.title: Expired lease: Jordan Kim – Unit 5F
task.body: The lease for Jordan Kim at Unit 5F, 22 Harbor View expired on 2024-02-28 and has not been renewed. Confirm move-out status or start a renewal conversation.

dialog.content: Jordan Kim's lease at Unit 5F expired on Feb 28 with no renewal. Is Jordan still in the unit, or has move-out been completed?
They moved out on March 1st. Deposit was returned already.
Got it — Jordan's tenancy is fully closed. I'll mark the unit as vacant, log the move-out date as March 1, and create a vacancy task for Unit 5F. Closing this expired lease task.

criteria: Agent's first message is a direct binary question (still in unit or moved out) — no preamble
Agent records move-out date from user's response
Agent proactively creates a vacancy task rather than requiring a separate prompt
Agent confirms all downstream actions in a single closing message
